Name: get_department_manager
SQL: SELECT "_subs"."result_id", "_fld_resp"."root" AS "result" FROM UNNEST($1::text[], $2::json[]) AS "_subs"("result_id", "result_vars") LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (SELECT json_build_object('get_department_manager', (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."get_department_manager"("department_id" := $3) AS "_fn_get_department_manager" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."department_id" AS "department_id", "_root.base"."user_id" AS "user_id", "_root.base"."role" AS "role") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base")) AS "root") AS "_fld_resp" ON ('true')
